task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module window, tab, or configuration dialog explicitly named 'WeatherSats'.

task_completion.description: Add the identified weather satellites to the 'WeatherSats' module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'WeatherSats' module configuration or its active tracking display. Verify that SUOMI NPP, FENGYUN 3A, FENGYUN 3B, and DMSP 5D-3 F18 (USA 210) are listed as selected or tracked satellites.

task_completion.description: Remove the weather satellites from the 'Amateur' module
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Amateur' module configuration ('Selected satellites' list) or its active tracking display. Verify that SUOMI NPP, FENGYUN 3A, FENGYUN 3B, and DMSP 5D-3 F18 are NO LONGER present in this module.

task_completion.description: Add a ground station for Fairbanks, AK with the correct coordinates
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Add Ground Station' or 'Edit Ground Station' dialog, or the ground stations list in GPredict Preferences. It must show a station for Fairbanks with Latitude 64.8378, Longitude -147.7164 (or 147.7164 W), and Altitude 133.

task_completion.description: Configure GPredict to use metric units
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GPredict Preferences window (likely under General -> Number Format or similar) showing that 'Metric' units are selected instead of Imperial.

integrity.description: Agent used the GPredict graphical interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the GPredict application windows and dialogs, rather than modifying .cfg files directly in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent used actual application settings dialogs
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the ground station and preferences changes were made through GPredict's built-in settings dialog boxes, not a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not spoof answers in a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent didn't just type the expected satellite names, module names, or coordinates into a text editor or terminal to simulate completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 4 weather satellites that must be moved are: SUOMI NPP, FENGYUN 3A, FENGYUN 3B, and DMSP 5D-3 F18 (USA 210). The target module name is exactly 'WeatherSats'. The Fairbanks ground station must have coordinates: 64.8378 N, 147.7164 W (or -147.7164), 133m altitude. Metric units must be selected in the application preferences.
